issues.title: Agency beats knowledge every time
issues.dek: The people winning with AI aren’t the most technical or the best-read — they’re the ones who already have the thing that matters most. A look at why the AI era is built for you, plus this week’s tool, prompt and image.
contents: Looking Sideways — The type of person the AI era is built for (hint: it’s you)
Real Wins — A real estate team, a bakery, and a vet clinic
Tool of the Week — The AI that does your bookkeeping while you sleep
Prompt of the Week — Let AI find the patterns in your own business data
The Magnum — Image of the Week

issues.title: What you already know
issues.dek: The real win isn’t AI doing your work for you — it’s AI catching what you already know but never write down. A look at where your business actually lives, plus this week’s tool, prompt and showcase.
contents: Looking Sideways — An accidental email series and what it tells you about your own business
Real Wins — Three small businesses who picked one thing and stuck with it
Tool of the Week — Granola, the meeting-notes app that doesn’t dial in as a guest
Prompt of the Week — Turn your last 30 reviews into the three things to fix this month
The Magnum — Vintage travel stamp illustration
